title.en: Try something new for 30 days - Matt Cutts

author: TED-Ed
description: 视频讲述了作者通过30天挑战改变生活的经历。他尝试每天拍照、骑车上班、攀登乞力马扎罗山等，发现30天足以养成新习惯或改掉旧习惯。这些挑战让时间更难忘，增强了自信心，并证明了只要坚持30天就能实现目标。

subtitles.en: A few years ago, I felt like I was stuck in a rut, so I decided to follow in the footsteps of the great American philosopher, Morgan Spurlock, and try something new for 30 days.
subtitles.zh: 几年前，我感觉自己陷入了困境，所以我决定效仿伟大的美国哲学家摩根·斯普尔洛克，尝试一些新事物，坚持30天。

subtitles.en: The idea is actually pretty simple.
subtitles.zh: 这个想法其实很简单。

subtitles.en: Think about something you've always wanted to add to your life and try it for the next 30 days.
subtitles.zh: 想想你一直想在生活中增加什么，然后在接下来的30天里尝试一下。

subtitles.en: It turns out, 30 days is just about the right amount of time to add a new habit or subtract a habit, like watching the news from your life.
subtitles.zh: 事实证明，30天正好是养成新习惯或戒掉旧习惯（比如看新闻）的合适时间。

subtitles.en: There's a few things that I learned while doing these 30 day challenges.
subtitles.zh: 在进行这些30天挑战的过程中，我学到了一些东西。

subtitles.en: The first was, instead of the months flying by forgotten, the time was much more memorable.
subtitles.zh: 第一点是，时间不再像以前那样飞逝而过、被人遗忘，而是变得更加难忘。

subtitles.en: This was part of a challenge I did to take a picture every day for a month, and I remember exactly where I was and what I was doing that day.
subtitles.zh: 这是我做的一个挑战的一部分——每天拍一张照片，坚持一个月，我清楚地记得那天我在哪里、在做什么。

subtitles.en: I also noticed that as I started to do more and harder 30 day challenges, my self-confidence grew.
subtitles.zh: 我还注意到，随着我开始做更多、更难的30天挑战，我的自信心也增强了。

subtitles.en: I went from desk-dwelling computer nerd to the kind of guy who bikes to work for fun.
subtitles.zh: 我从一个整天坐在办公桌前的电脑宅男，变成了一个为了乐趣而骑车上班的人。

subtitles.en: Even last year, I ended up hiking up Mount Kilimanjaro, the highest mountain in Africa.
subtitles.zh: 甚至去年，我还成功登上了非洲最高峰乞力马扎罗山。

subtitles.en: I would never have been that adventurous before I started my 30 day challenges.
subtitles.zh: 在我开始30天挑战之前，我从来不会这么有冒险精神。

subtitles.en: I also figured out that if you really want something badly enough, you can do anything for 30 days.
subtitles.zh: 我还发现，如果你真的非常想要某样东西，你可以坚持做任何事情30天。

subtitles.en: Have you ever wanted to write a novel?
subtitles.zh: 你有没有想过写一本小说？

subtitles.en: Every November, tens of thousands of people try to write their own 50,000 word novel from scratch in 30 days.
subtitles.zh: 每年十一月，成千上万的人尝试在30天内从零开始写出自己的5万字小说。

subtitles.en: It turns out, all you have to do is write 1,667 words a day for a month.
subtitles.zh: 事实证明，你只需要在一个月里每天写1667个字。

subtitles.en: So I did.
subtitles.zh: 所以我做到了。

subtitles.en: By the way, the secret is not to go to sleep until you've written your words for the day.
subtitles.zh: 顺便说一下，秘诀就是每天写完当天的字数之前不要睡觉。

subtitles.en: You might be sleep deprived, but you'll finish your novel.
subtitles.zh: 你可能会睡眠不足，但你会完成你的小说。

subtitles.en: Now, is my book the next great American novel?
subtitles.zh: 那么，我的书会成为下一部伟大的美国小说吗？

subtitles.en: No, I wrote it in a month.
subtitles.zh: 不，我一个月就写完了。

subtitles.en: It's awful.
subtitles.zh: 它写得很糟糕。

subtitles.en: But for the rest of my life, if I meet John Hodgman at a TED party, I don't have to say, I'm a computer scientist.
subtitles.zh: 但在我的余生里，如果我在TED派对上遇到约翰·霍奇曼，我就不用说“我是个计算机科学家”了。

subtitles.en: No, no.
subtitles.zh: 不，不。

subtitles.en: If I want to, I can say, I'm a novelist.
subtitles.zh: 如果我想，我可以说：“我是个小说家。”

subtitles.en: So here's one last thing I'd like to mention.
subtitles.zh: 所以，我想提的最后一点是。

subtitles.en: I learned that when I made small, sustainable changes, things I could keep doing, they were more likely to stick.
subtitles.zh: 我发现，当我做出微小、可持续的改变，那些我能坚持下去的事情，它们更可能成为习惯。

subtitles.en: There's nothing wrong with big, crazy challenges.
subtitles.zh: 那些宏大、疯狂的挑战本身没什么问题。

subtitles.en: In fact, they're a ton of fun, but they're less likely to stick.
subtitles.zh: 事实上，它们非常有趣，但不太可能持久。

subtitles.en: When I gave up sugar for 30 days, Day 31 looked like this.
subtitles.zh: 当我戒糖30天后，第31天就成了这样。

subtitles.en: So here's my question to you.
subtitles.zh: 所以我想问你一个问题。

subtitles.en: What are you waiting for?
subtitles.zh: 你还在等什么？

subtitles.en: I guarantee you the next 30 days are going to pass whether you like it or not.
subtitles.zh: 我敢保证，无论你喜不喜欢，接下来的30天都会过去。

key_phrases.phrase: whether you like it or not

subtitles.en: So why not think about something you have always wanted to try?
subtitles.zh: 那为什么不考虑一下你一直想尝试的事情呢？

subtitles.en: And give it a shot for the next 30 days.
subtitles.zh: 并在接下来的30天里试一试。

subtitles.en: Thanks.
subtitles.zh: 谢谢。
